name: active_user
definition_text: Users who completed at least one paid transaction in the trailing 30 days.
sql_logic: COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) WHERE txn_amount > 0 AND event_date >= CURRENT_DATE - 30

name: active_user
definition_text: Any user with a session or app open in the last 30 days, bots excluded upstream by the safety pipeline.
sql_logic: COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) WHERE session_start >= CURRENT_DATE - 30 AND is_bot = false

name: revenue
definition_text: Gross bookings minus refunds and chargebacks, recognized in the period.

name: revenue
definition_text: Total value of closed-won deals booked in the period, before refunds.

name: customer_churn
definition_text: Share of paying customers who cancelled their subscription in the period.
sql_logic: COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) WHERE subscription_status = 'cancelled' / COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id)

name: attrition
definition_text: Fraction of paying customers who cancelled their subscription during the period.
sql_logic: COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id) WHERE subscription_status = 'cancelled' / COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id)
